Astroflux Wiki
Guides Quests Systems Stations Enemies Bosses Weapons Ships Items Artifacts Drops Media Map

Unique Artifacts

Sprites come from the GameFS atlas, and unique stat families are marked when the client exposes a stable mapping.

Unique artifactStat / effectDamage / build focusBossesCrateSource status
AdvectorianFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheunconfirmedAdvectorian artifact rolls 6Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Armorlock ProtocolStationary damage reduction: Adds damage reduction while stationary.
damageReductionWhileStationaryUnique		Stationary tankingNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Bloodline SurgeOn-kill surge: Kills grant a short stackable damage and mitigation boost.
bloodlineSurge		On-kill snowballingNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Bullwark PrismUnique low shield reduction: Adds damage reduction when shields are low.
damageReductionWithLowShieldUnique		Low-shield survivalNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
CleanerFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheunconfirmedThe Cleaner artifact rolls 6-10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Crown of XhersixCleansing crown: Automatically cleanses debuffs on a timer.
crownOfXhersix		Cleanse / defenseThree Emperors artifact rolls 10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
DominatorFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheunconfirmedDominator artifact rolls 1-3Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Eternal AegisUnique damage reduction: Reduces incoming damage.
damageReductionUnique		Tank / survivalNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Fist of ZharixKill shockwave: Kills trigger a shockwave that damages nearby enemies.
fistOfZharix		On-kill AoE burstThree Emperors artifact rolls 10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
Hyper Acid SplicerCorrosive ignite: Corrosive hits can splice the hull for extra corrosive damage.
corrosiveChanceToIgnite		Corrosive hit buildsNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Impact Emitter CoreSlow debuff: Hits can slow enemy movement for 4 seconds.
slowDown		Control / slow buildsNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Legacy CoreLegacy ship upgrade: Legacy hull, shield, and armor upgrade for ships.
upgrade		Legacy ship upgradeNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Lunacite CoreLucanite core: Weapons can reduce the target's outgoing damage for 4 seconds.
lucaniteCore		Enemy damage reductionNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Mantis CoreClose target damage core: Adds damage when the target is close.
mantisCore		Close-range brawlingNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
MotherbrainOvermind: Doubles pet count and increases pet health.
overmind		Pet buildsMother Brain artifact rolls 6Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
Omega Shield DriverEnergy shield overload: Energy hits can overload shields for extra energy damage.
energyChanceToShieldOverload		Energy / Shield-burst hitsNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Phase NullifierKinetic shield penetration: Kinetic hits can bypass shields and deal part of the kinetic damage directly to hull.
kineticChanceToPenetrateShield		Kinetic / Shield-bypass hitsNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Plasma Disruptor RelicEnergy resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target energy resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceEnergyResistance		Energy / Resistance shredNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Ring of YxthalKinetic resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target kinetic resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceKineticResistance		Kinetic / Resistance shredNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Scourgebinder CoreCorrosive resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target corrosive resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceCorrosiveResistance		Corrosive / Resistance shredNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
TefatFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheunconfirmedTefat artifact rolls 1, 1, 1Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Thermofang CoreBurning target kinetic core: Adds kinetic damage against burning targets.
thermofangCore		Kinetic / Burn synergyNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Time Flux RelicFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheunconfirmedNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactSprite only
Titanheart CoreUnique low health reduction: Adds damage reduction when health is low.
damageReductionWithLowHealthUnique		Low-health survivalNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Veil of YhgvisCloak ambush veil: Gives damage reduction while cloaked and bonus ambush damage.
veilOfYhgvis		Cloak ambushThree Emperors artifact rolls 10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
Velocity CoreVelocity core: Large ship speed increase.
velocityCore		Mobility / travelNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Virex InjectorUnique debuff damage: Increases damage dealt by debuffs.
dotDamageUnique		Corrosive DoT buildsNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
